rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: High fuel/energy consumption indicates efficiency losses.
suggestedActions: Regular maintenance improves overall equipment efficiency.
Simulate real-world driving conditions for accurate range estimates.

description.short: Calculate EV battery charging time from 0 to 100%.
description.long: Calculate EV battery charging time from 0 to 100%.

short_i18n.en: Calculate EV battery charging time from 0 to 100%.
short_i18n.tr: Elektrikli araç bataryasının %0'dan %100'e dolum süresini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Ladezeit eines Elektrofahrzeug-Akkus von 0 auf 100 %.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le temps de charge de la batterie d'un véhicule électrique de 0 à 100%.
short_i18n.es: Calcule el tiempo de carga de la batería del vehículo eléctrico del 0 al 100%.
short_i18n.ar: احسب وقت شحن بطارية السيارة الكهربائية من 0 إلى 100%.
